title: elymus × saundersii
intro: Elymus × saundersii, also known as Saunders' wildrye, is a hybrid grass species within the Elymus genus, native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elymus × saundersii include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and potentially lowering blood pressure due to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
